metadata_update.recommendation_short: qwen3:32b is NOT a viable replacement for gemma4:26b. 5x slower (11.7 vs 57.4 t/s), 80% more GPU memory (31 vs 17 GB), 6.4x less context (40960 vs 262144), and requires think:false workaround. Keep gemma4:26b as primary local model. Only consider qwen3:32b for non-latency-sensitive quality-differentiated tasks.

comparison_to_tkt1014.32b_verdict: GO-WITH-CAVEATS (as qwen3 quality-differentiated option) / NO-GO (as 26b replacement)
